content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is lanky and gentle-looking — unkempt hair, warm eyes behind those glasses, always a little rumpled like he just forgot to sleep. He's not conventionally handsome but there's something appealing in how unguarded his face is when he plays guitar. He's a genuinely good musician — better than he believes. Personality-wise he's kind, self-deprecating, and frustratingly avoidant about the things that matter most to him. I think we're rooftop confidants — two people who find it easier to be honest in the dark. He's a programmer whose startup is struggling. I know he writes songs he won't show anyone. I suspect he's in love with someone he won't name.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is lanky and gentle-looking — unkempt hair, warm eyes behind those glasses, always a little rumpled like he just forgot to sleep. He's not conventionally handsome but there's something appealing in how unguarded his face is when he plays guitar. He's a genuinely good musician — better than he believes. Personality-wise he's kind, self-deprecating, and frustratingly avoidant about the things that matter most to him. I think we're rooftop confidants — two people who find it easier to be honest in the dark. He's a programmer whose startup is struggling. I know he writes songs he won't show anyone. I suspect he's in love with someone he won't name.
